attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY               
,GL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,GL.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,GL.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,GL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
,GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY<0 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY         
,GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,GL.DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY    
,GL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,GL.SALES_REP_NUMBER              
,GL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT     
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  
,GL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT       
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD    
,GL.DD_GL_DATETIME                
,GL.DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD        
,GL.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.DV_FISCAL_DT                  
,GL.DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     
,GL.DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD          
,GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD 
,GL.DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD            
,GL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD       
,GL.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD         
,GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG      
,GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG             
,GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG                
,GL.DV_MISC_FLG                   
,GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG                
,GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG     
,GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG       
,GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG                
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT       
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT      
,GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT        
,GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT     
,GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT 
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY           
,GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY         
,GL.EDW_CREATE_USER               
,GL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           
,GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD         
,GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD    
,GL.GL_DT                         
,GL.BK_SS_CD                      
,GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY               
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,GL.OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD        
,GL.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD              
,GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD  
,GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY   
,GL.TRANSACTION_DT                
,GL.GL_POSTED_DTM                 
,GL.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY
,GL.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,GL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           
,GL.DV_FMV_FLG                    
,GL.DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD     
,GL.DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT        
,GL.DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT   
,GL.BK_SUBINVENTORY_NAME          
,GL.DV_ERP_DEAL_ID                
,CMN.NEW_XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                 
,CMN.NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME       
,CMN.NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG      
,CMN.NEW_ELA_FLG AS ELA_FLG
,GL.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,GL.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
,GL.DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL,
$$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_ASTADJ CMN 
WHERE
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY=CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD  = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
AND GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ WGL
WHERE  WGL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY 
AND WGL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
AND WGL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD)

SELECT 
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,XCAT_FLG                      
,BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,ELA_FLG                       
,NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,NEW_ELA_FLG  
,'N' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD 
,'Y' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD                
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_ASTADJ MAPFLG 
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_ASTADJ CMN
WHERE CMN.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY = MAPFLG.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY
AND CMN.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT = MAPFLG.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CMN.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = MAPFLG.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
)

SELECT 
GL.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS XCAT_FLG                
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
,GL.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG                  
,OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME        
,OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG       
,CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END  AS NEW_ELA_FLG          
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
ON  GL.PRODUCT_KEY = OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_PRODUCT_KEY= OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
AND GL.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD = OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD 
WHERE GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='DRCT_AS_T'
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0 
AND OMAP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_AST_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_MAP_FLG_ASTADJ')
AND ( GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME <>OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME 
OR GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG <> OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
OR GL.ELA_FLG <> CASE WHEN NEW_XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END )
AND 1=2

SELECT
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
/* ,NSO.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */                
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME   /*  added as part of april9th2017 */        
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG	 /*  added as part of april9th2017 */        
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG	 /*  added as part of april9th2017 */        
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='DRCT_AS_T'
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND NSO.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_AST_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_ASTADJ' )
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2

UNION 
SELECT
REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY           
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD     
,GL.XCAT_FLG                      
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME            
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG           
,GL.ELA_FLG                       
/* ,NP.XCAT_FLG AS NEW_XCAT_FLG  */
,(CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END) AS NEW_XCAT_FLG /*  added as part of april9th2017 */    
,GL.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME AS NEW_BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
,GL.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG AS NEW_RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
,GL.ELA_FLG AS NEW_ELA_FLG
,'Y' AS XCAT_FLG_UPD
,'N' AS MAP_FLGS_UPD
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE GL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  = RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON GL.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
WHERE NSO.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
AND GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ='DRCT_AS_T'
AND RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 3
AND RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >= 0
AND NP.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES
WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WK_GL_REVENUE_MEASURE_AST_ADJ' AND TABLE_NAME ='WI_GL_RORTRO_XCT_MP_FLG_ASTADJ')
AND GL.XCAT_FLG <> (CASE WHEN NSO.XCAT_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSO.XCAT_FLG ELSE  NP.XCAT_FLG END)
AND 1=2

SELECT 
WIAST.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
WIAST.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
WIAST.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
WIAST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
WIAST.GL_POSTED_DTM ,
WIAST.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD , 
WIAST.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE ,
CASE WHEN ESS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'DRCT_AS_T' ELSE 'IND_ADJ' END REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD ,
WIAST.SS_CD ,
WIAST.DD_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
WIAST.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
( WIAST.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE( ESS.EVENT_SOL_TO_STK_RATIO,1) )  DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
WIAST.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,
( WIAST.DV_FUNCTIONAL_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE( ESS.EVENT_SOL_TO_STK_RATIO,1) )  DV_FUNCTIONAL_PRICE_AMT,
WIAST.BK_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,
( WIAST.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_PRICE_AMT * COALESCE( ESS.EVENT_SOL_TO_STK_RATIO,1) )  DV_TRANSACTIONAL_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE( ESS.SALES_ORDER_KEY , -9999) SALES_ORDER_KEY ,
COALESCE( ESS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , -9999) SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
COALESCE( ESS.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER , 'UNKNOWN' ) BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
COALESCE ( /*EVP.ITEM_KEY*/  ESS.PRODUCT_KEY , D_PID.ITEM_KEY ) PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE( ESS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
WIAST.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR,
WIAST.BK_COMPANY_CODE  
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_AST WIAST
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ESS.EVENT_ID, RPF.ITEM_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_EVENT_SOL_STK_RATIO ESS 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_EVENTS PE ON CAST(PE.EVENT_ID AS VARCHAR(10) ) = CAST ( TRIM( ESS.EVENT_ID ) AS VARCHAR(10)  ) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT RPF ON RPF.BK_PRODUCT_ID = PE.ATTRIBUTE2 GROUP BY 1,2 )  EVP
ON CAST ( TRIM( EVP.EVENT_ID ) AS VARCHAR(10)  )  = CAST ( TRIM( WIAST.EVENT_ID  ) AS VARCHAR(10)  ) */
LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
SELECT ESS.*, 
CASE WHEN NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY < 0 THEN NULL ELSE NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY  END PRODUCT_KEY 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_EVENT_SOL_STK_RATIO ESS 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = ESS.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ESS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
) ESS ON CAST( TRIM(ESS.EVENT_ID) AS VARCHAR(10) )  = CAST (  TRIM(WIAST.EVENT_ID) AS VARCHAR(10) ) 
INNER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_KEY FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT WHERE BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'AS TRANSACTION_ADJ_PROD' ) D_PID ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA  ON NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WIAST.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AS_TRAN_ACCT_DELVY_THR_MAP EAGAS ON EAGAS.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE   
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY RSH ON RSH.BK_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE=EAGAS.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE 
AND RSH.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE IN ('CORP. REVENUE') 
/*INNER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = ESS.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = ESS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ; */

SELECT 
JEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
JEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
( (JEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT * 100 ) + JEL.EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT ) DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
JEL.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
JE.POSTED_DTM GL_POSTED_DTM ,
JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD , 
COALESCE(EOP.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE, 'UNKNOWN' ) BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE ,
JEL.SS_CD ,
'GL ADJUSTMENTS - AS TRANSACTIO' DD_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN JES.USER_DEFINED_NAME = 'AS PROJECTS' AND JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME = 'REVENUE' THEN 'OP_ADJ' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD , 
(ZEROIFNULL(RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT) )DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT ,
JEL.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
(ZEROIFNULL(RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT) - ZEROIFNULL(RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT ) )DV_FUNCTIONAL_PRICE_AMT ,
JE.TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD BK_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE   ,
(ZEROIFNULL(RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT ) - ZEROIFNULL(RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT)) DV_TRANSACTIONAL_PRICE_AMT ,
CASE WHEN  JES.USER_DEFINED_NAME  = 'AS PROJECTS' AND JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME = 'REVENUE' THEN SUBSTR ( JEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR, 0, POSITION ( '-' IN JEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR)  ) ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END EVENT_ID ,
JEL.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR,
JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE JEL
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY JE ON JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = JEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  AND JE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = JEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE JES ON JES.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME = JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  AND JES.SS_CD = JE.SS_CD 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOP ON EOP.BK_COMPANY_CODE = JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE AND EOP.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = JEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MTH_CNTL_AS CNTL ON CNTL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = JEL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
WHERE JE.POSTED_DTM IS NOT NULL
/*  GENERIC CONDITIONS STARTS */
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       IN (  '42725','42726','42727 ','42728','42701', '42702', '42703', '42704', '42706', '42707', '42708', '42711', '42712', '42713', '42714', '42710', '42716', '42717', '42718', '42719', '42720', '42721', '42722', '42723', '42724','42705','42709','42715')   /* added 42715 as part of CE data enablement */
  
AND (   (    JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME   = 'Receivables'  AND JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME IN ('Misc Receipts', 'Adjustment', 'Trade Receipts')  )  OR JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ( 'CG1_RECEIVABLES','Receivables')  ) /* as per request from Biz team*/
AND (  JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ( SELECT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE WHERE USER_DEFINED_NAME = 'CCRM')
            OR JE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ( SELECT BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME 
            FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY WHERE JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_DESCR =  'Commitment Compliance Revenue Manager Related Template Based Adjustment') )   
/*  GENERIC CONDITIONS ENDS */
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD IN ('MO', 'MC')   /* TO EXCLUDE THE CONSOLIDATIONS*/
/*  RRR IT CONDITIONS STARTS  FOR GL ADJUSTMENTS - AS TRANSACTIO*/
AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT LIKE '4218%'  AND  JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT LIKE '4275%'  
/* AND JEL.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD NOT IN ( '42718')  */
AND JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE NOT LIKE '4%' 

/* 02/13/2014 Excluding Bk Company Codes '078', '092', '093', '094', '095', '096', '225', '289','168','678'*/
/* 03/03/2015 Excluding Bk Company Codes '062','069','880','887' */
/* 03/22/2015 Excluding Bk Company Codes '693','087','698','711' */
/* 04/23/2014 Excluding Account codes 287,517,677,270,696 */
/* 09/23/2015 Excluded Bk Company Codes  697  */

 AND JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE NOT IN  ('083','084','085','386','387',                                 
		'388','389', '390','391','392','393','394','395','396','288' ,
		'028','173','079','222','223','634','635','636','637','638',
		'639','640','641','642','643','644','645','646','647','648',
		'649','650','651','652','653','654','655','091','708','661',
		'959','667','290','674','078', '092', '093', '094', '095', '096', 
		'225','289','062','069','880','887','693','087', '698' ,'711','696',  '011','803','815','016','017','827','013','911','912','913','914','915','916','917','918','919','920','921','922','923','924','925','926','927','928','929','930','931','932','933','934','937','938','939','940','941','942','943','944')
 /* removed the below company codes from  NOT IN condition 
 '673','689','678','690','660','517',
		'659','197','668','224','665','677','221','168','801',
		'270','666','287','672','669','697','188','613','662','676',
		'670','286','663','285','539')*/		
AND (JEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE NOT IN ( '010') AND JEL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD NOT IN ('TBA')) 
/*  RRR IT CONDITIONS ENDS  FOR GL ADJUSTMENTS - AS TRANSACTION*/
/* adding below to filter Offer Attribution Transactions, as  they are reported under Invoice 
and also under GL ADJUSTMENT AS TRANSACTION  causing the delta when compared with GL.  */

AND JES.JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_DESCR<>'Offer Attribution'

SELECT 
EVENT_ID
,SALES_ORDER_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE
,SUM(ZEROIFNULL(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE))  OVER ( PARTITION BY EVENT_ID)   TOTAL_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE
,CASE WHEN ZEROIFNULL(SUM(ZEROIFNULL(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE))  OVER ( PARTITION BY EVENT_ID) ) = 0 THEN 0 
                                                ELSE ( ZEROIFNULL(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE) / ( ZEROIFNULL (SUM(ZEROIFNULL(SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE))  OVER ( PARTITION BY EVENT_ID) )) )   
END EVENT_SOL_TO_STK_RATIO 
FROM 
( SELECT  EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK.EVENT_ID ,
EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK.SALES_ORDER_KEY, 
EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
SCA.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
SCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , 
SUM(SCA.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE)  SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_AST WGRMA
INNER JOIN 
			( SELECT PE.EVENT_ID, NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY, NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
			FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
			ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
			AND NSOL.ITEM_TYPE_CODE IN ('STANDARD', 'MODEL')
			INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CTS_PA_EVENTS PE
			ON PE.ATTRIBUTE1 =  CAST ( NSOL.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(20) )
			AND PE.ATTRIBUTE3 = CAST ( NSOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT AS VARCHAR(20) ) ) 
EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK
ON CAST ( EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK.EVENT_ID AS VARCHAR(10) ) = WGRMA.EVENT_ID 
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT SCA
ON EVENT_SO_LINE_LINK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SCA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
WHERE SCA.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE in ('L', 'Direct Sales')  /* knarlapu: Added L type */
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5 ) EVENT_SOL_STK_DATA

SELECT RANK() OVER ( ORDER BY 
REV_MEASURE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
REV_MEASURE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT ,
REV_MEASURE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY ,
REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM,
REV_MEASURE.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD , 
REV_MEASURE.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,
REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
REV_MEASURE.SS_CD ,
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' 
THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE REV_MEASURE.DD_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD END   ,
REV_MEASURE.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD,
REV_MEASURE.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
REV_MEASURE.BK_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR,
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' 
THEN 'AST SERVICE REV' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END
  ) + COALESCE(W_AST.REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,0) DV_REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY,
REV_MEASURE. SALES_ORDER_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_KEY,
 -9999 AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
-9999 BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
-999 END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
-999 BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
-999 SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
-999 SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
-9999 DIRECT_CORP_ADJUSTMENT_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
REV_MEASURE.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER   SALES_REP_NUMBER ,
CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER) BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)           BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)            BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,
REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT      DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
REV_MEASURE.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)       DD_GL_DATETIME,
REV_MEASURE.BK_TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE DD_BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME ,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  DV_FISCAL_DT ,
REV_MEASURE.BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE  DD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' DD_BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CD ,
( CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' 
THEN 'AST SERVICE REV' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END ) DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD,
NULL  DD_SERVICE_TYPE_CD ,
'UNKNOWN' BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AR_TRX_DATETIME ,
REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
'UNKWOWN' DV_FORWARD_REVERSE_CD,
 CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR    (CASESPECIFIC) LIKE '%NRSnrs%'  THEN 'N'
      WHEN DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD = 42710 THEN 'N'  
 ELSE 'Y' END DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
 'Y' DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
 'N' DV_CHARGES_FLG,
 'N' DV_MISC_FLG,
'Y'  DV_SERVICE_FLG,
 'N' DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
 'N' DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
 'Y' DV_REVENUE_FLG,
REV_MEASURE.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT,
0   DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT,
0   DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM  ,
0 DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT,
REV_MEASURE.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT,
0    DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
0    DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY,
0    DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER              , 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME     ,     
(CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' 
THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE REV_MEASURE.DD_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD END) DD_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
(CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 'REVENUE' END) BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD, NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE(FORMAT 'YY/MM/DD'  ) AS GL_DT,
REV_MEASURE.SS_CD ,
0 DV_EXTENDED_QTY    ,              
REV_MEASURE.DV_FUNCTIONAL_PRICE_AMT GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  ,      
REV_MEASURE.DV_TRANSACTIONAL_PRICE_AMT GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  ,    
REV_MEASURE.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   ,         
(CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' THEN 'ADJ' ELSE NULL END) ACCOUNT_CLASS_CD, 
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD = 'UNKNOWN' THEN NULL ELSE REV_MEASURE.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD END TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY ,
NULL WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY  ,     
DATE TRANSACTION_DT,
REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM   GL_POSTED_DTM   ,
RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1 AS RAE_ADJUSTMENT_SCHEDULE_LN_KEY,
COALESCE(REV_MEASURE.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK') BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,
TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY DV_TRANS_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 DV_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
0 DV_FUNC_SHIPPED_REVENUE_AMT, /* Added is part of  Q3FY15 ICPM as ICMS fix*/
CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'DRCT_AS_T' THEN COALESCE(SO.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS DV_ERP_DEAL_ID,/*Added as part of FCM*/
'I'    ACTION_CODE,
'I'    DML_TYPE,
REV_MEASURE.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR  ,
REV_MEASURE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
REV_MEASURE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
CASE WHEN SO.XCAT_FLG='Y' THEN SO.XCAT_FLG ELSE COALESCE(NP.XCAT_FLG,'N') END AS  XCAT_FLG_DRVD , /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,'Others' )  AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE(OMAP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG ,'N' ) AS RECURRING_OFFER_FLG, /* added as part of RO proj, Q3FY17 */
COALESCE((CASE WHEN XCAT_FLG_DRVD='Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE OMAP.ELA_FLG END),'N') AS ELA_FLG  /* RO proj, Q3FY17  16th March release*/
,CASE WHEN  REV_MEASURE.JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR   (CASESPECIFIC) LIKE '%NRSnrs%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END  AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG
,RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG AS NRS_TRANSITION_FLG
,RFDP.DV_FISCAL_YR_MNTH_WEEK_NUM_INT AS DV_TRX_FSC_YR_MTH_WK_NUM_INT  /*ADDED AS PART OF JUNE WEEKLY_BILLINGS FY20*/
FROM $$STGDB.WI_GL_REV_MEASURE_AST_STK  REV_MEASURE 
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY
ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=REV_MEASURE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFDP
ON RFDP.CALENDAR_DATE=COALESCE(CASE WHEN REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM < RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
WHEN REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM IS NOT NULL AND REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM > RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE THEN RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
ELSE Cast(REV_MEASURE.GL_POSTED_DTM AS DATE) END ,RFMY.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)
/*ADDED AS PART OF  WEEKLY BILLINGS FY20*/
INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY ) REVENUE_MEASURE_KEY FROM $$WORKDB.W_GL_REV_MEASURE_IND_ADJ  
WHERE REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = 'IND_ADJ' ) W_AST 
ON 1 = 1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
ON NFM.DV_CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SO
ON SO.SALES_ORDER_KEY = REV_MEASURE.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SO.END_TV_DATETIME= '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY
LEFT JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.MT_OFFER_TYPE_PRDT_MAP OMAP
ON OMAP.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
AND OMAP.DV_PRODUCT_KEY=REV_MEASURE.PRODUCT_KEY
AND OMAP.BK_OFFER_ATTRBTN_TYPE_CD = 'STANDALONE'
